social_posts.facebook:
SpaceX has inked a significant compute deal with Reflection AI, an open-source AI lab. The agreement, worth $150 million a month, provides Reflection AI with immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee. This deal highlights the growing intersection of space technology and AI research.
Link: https://techcrunch.com/2026/06/22/spacex-inks-compute-deal-with-reflection-ai-an-open-source-ai-lab/

social_posts.facebook: OpenAI has unveiled a significant new initiative to address open-source software bugs with GPT-5.5-Cyber. This move is part of their broader strategy to enhance AI model cybersecurity capabilities, directly competing with Anthropic's Mythos. The 'Patch the Plant' initiative aims to fix vulnerabilities and improve the overall security of open-source software. Link: https://www.wired.com/story/openai-launches-full-scale-effort-to-patch-open-source-bugs-as-it-takes-on-anthropics-mythos/

payload.facebook: The statistically efficient Byte-Pair Encoding tokenization method has a significant flaw - it is semantically blind to structured technical entities. This can lead to the fragmentation of physical quantities, numbers, units, and symbolic expressions into arbitrary subwords. Link: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.19626

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔥 Tokenization of Technical Entities Revisited

The Byte-Pair Encoding method is statistically efficient but semantically blind to structured technical entities, leading to fragmentation of physical quantities and symbolic expressions.

🏛️ Source: arXiv (C)
⏰ Published: 4 hours ago
⭐ Score: 6.0/10

🔗 https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.19626
